subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for the note — I’d be happy to set up a 30-minute call next week to explore this. I’m available Tue–Thu between 14:00 and 17:00 UTC, but I can flex if you propose a couple of options. Send over the times that work for you and I’ll lock one in.

I can’t share internal contact details for colleagues, but if there’s a specific topic your team wants to cover, I can make sure the right people are included once we’ve confirmed a slot.

Best,
[Your Name]
